summary: Comprehensive regression testing after backend refactoring from monolithic server.py to 18 modular route files. Backend: 40/40 API tests passed. Frontend: All critical UI elements verified - login, dashboard, GM Screen with all 12 tabs working.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful - all 18 route files properly integrated via routes/__init__.py
All routers correctly imported and included in all_routers list
server.py is now a thin orchestrator (~148 lines) that assembles modular routers
CORS, WebSocket, and health check endpoints properly configured in server.py
All API endpoints maintain backward compatibility after refactoring
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test campaign b51ba0e9-5b08-44ed-b3dd-4a97dd2a09f6
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring verified complete. All 40 API endpoint tests pass. Frontend loads correctly with login, dashboard (Player/GM sides), and GM Screen (12 tabs). Test campaign has 3 NPCs. AI Co-GM feature present.

backend_tests_summary.auth: 3/3 passed - login, auth/me, account/profile all working
backend_tests_summary.campaigns: 4/4 passed - list, get by id, setting, world-setting
backend_tests_summary.npcs: 2/2 passed - list NPCs, list NPC relationships
backend_tests_summary.admin: 3/3 passed - admin check, featured reviews, custom creatures

frontend_tests_summary.auth_page: PASSED - Login form loads with email/password fields
frontend_tests_summary.dashboard: PASSED - Shows Player Side (4 characters) and GM Side (3 campaigns)
frontend_tests_summary.gm_screen_tabs: PASSED - All 12 tabs found: Combat, Location, NPCs, NPC Network, Monsters, Tables, Loot, Dice, Party, Notes, Story Arcs, Soundboard
frontend_tests_summary.npcs_tab: PASSED - Shows 3 NPCs with NPC Quick Reference and Name Generator
frontend_tests_summary.combat_tab: PASSED - Shows Combat Control with encounter selection and Spontaneous Combat
frontend_tests_summary.location_tab: PASSED - Shows Party Location with world map upload prompt
frontend_tests_summary.ai_cogm: PASSED - AI Co-GM toggle button found (data-testid='ai-cogm-toggle')

route_files_verified: routes/admin.py - Admin, reviews, custom creatures endpoints
routes/notes.py - In-game notes, timeline, session recaps
routes/maps.py - Battle maps, world maps, local maps
